@graph.name: HTML5 Micro Game Kit
@graph.description: A complete browser-playable micro game kit with source, cover art, README, and listing copy.

@graph.name: Procedural SFX Pack
@graph.description: Original WAV sound effects with preview page, README, license note, and listing copy.

@graph.name: SVG Icon Pack
@graph.description: A 24-file SVG icon pack with preview gallery, README, and listing copy.

@graph.name: Printable Puzzle and Planner Pack
@graph.description: Printable planner pages, math worksheets, answer keys, cover art, and listing copy.

@graph.name: Synthetic Mock Dataset Pack
@graph.description: Synthetic CSV/JSON datasets with a preview dashboard and data dictionary.

@graph.name: Browser Extension Template
@graph.description: Manifest V3 browser extension starter with popup UI, local storage, README, and listing copy.

@graph.name: CSV CLI Toolkit
@graph.description: Ruby CSV profiling and cleanup CLI with sample input, README, and listing copy.

@graph.name: CSS Component Pack
@graph.description: Reusable HTML/CSS components for cards, pricing tables, dashboards, and forms.

@graph.name: SVG Wallpaper Pattern Pack
@graph.description: Ten original SVG wallpapers and patterns with a gallery page and listing copy.

@graph.name: Anki-Ready Flashcard Deck
@graph.description: Anki-ready CSV flashcard deck for spreadsheet and data-cleaning concepts.

@graph.name: Mini Course Workbook
@graph.description: Self-study workbook on building a simple digital product offer, with checklist and sales page.

@graph.name: JSON Schema Fixture Pack
@graph.description: JSON schemas and valid/invalid fixtures for common SaaS objects.

@graph.name: Invoice and Expense Tracker Template
@graph.description: A lightweight CSV and local dashboard template for freelancers tracking invoices, expenses, status, and outstanding payments.

@graph.name: Prompt Workflow Pack
@graph.description: A local-service prompt library and workflow pack for intake replies, quote follow-ups, review responses, and internal summaries.

@graph.name: Sales Enablement Kit
@graph.description: Proposal library, compliant outreach sequence, prospect tracker, profile checklist, case study template, and simple portfolio page for fixed-scope service sellers.

@graph.name: Website Audit Microservice
@graph.description: Public website, landing-page, accessibility, mobile, copy, and QA quick-win audits.

@graph.name: Data Cleanup Sprint
@graph.description: CSV/spreadsheet cleanup with normalized output, validation counts, and a short QA report.

@graph.name: AI Workflow Tracker Sprint
@graph.description: A CSV-backed tracker and static HTML dashboard for interviews, leads, grants, or sales pipelines.

@graph.name: Static Demo Site Customization
@graph.description: A polished one-page starter site customized for a local service business.

@graph.name: Niche Quote Estimator
@graph.description: A browser-only quote estimator customized for a simple service pricing model.

@graph.name: Automation Blueprint
@graph.description: Trigger, data field, step, failure-case, and test-plan blueprint for a repetitive workflow.

@graph.name: Local SEO / GBP Audit
@graph.description: Public local profile and citation audit with review-response and profile-copy suggestions.

@graph.name: Technical Docs Cleanup
@graph.description: README, quickstart, API page, or SOP cleanup with audit rubric and before/after handoff.

@graph.name: Client Intake and SOP Package
@graph.description: Reusable intake question bank, SOP template, delivery checklist, and status dashboard.

@graph.name: PDF/Table Extraction
@graph.description: Authorized PDF, screenshot, or messy table extraction into CSV plus a summary dashboard.

@graph.name: Content Repurposing Sprint
@graph.description: Newsletter, social posts, captions, hooks, and publishing checklist from one source asset.

@graph.name: Resume / LinkedIn / Interview Pack
@graph.description: Truthful resume, LinkedIn, cover letter, and interview prep packet.

@graph.name: Resale Listing and Price Research Pack
@graph.description: Item-intake, photo checklist, comparable-price research template, listing drafts, pricing risk notes, and owner posting checklist for up to 10 owned items.

@graph.name: Translation and Localization Draft Pack
@graph.description: Review-ready localization intake, glossary notes, draft structure, locale choices, and QA checklist for up to 1,000 source words.

@graph.name: Subscription Audit and Savings Prep Pack
@graph.description: Recurring-charge audit template, savings calculator, cancellation/downgrade scripts, risk controls, and proof checklist for finding avoidable subscription costs.
